positive: A stylized, symmetrical, minimalist geometric illustration featuring a glowing celestial body, like a crescent moon and stylized stars, nestled within intricate organic mandalas. The overall scene should depict a cosmic forest or nebula scene, utilizing deep indigo, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and ethereal gold accents. Emphasis on strong linework, negative space, and clean, crisp silhouettes. The composition must be centrally balanced and highly detailed, designed for maximum impact on fabric, suitable for a repeating or single placement print. Style of scientific illustration meets Art Nouveau graphic design. High contrast, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, amateur, low resolution, noisy, distorted, text, typography, watermark, signature, logo, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, fuzzy, grain, jpeg artifacts
